item.title: Ukrainian attack triggers fire at oil terminal in Russia’s Krasnodar region
item.description: Kyiv continues to target the energy facilities that help fund Moscow's four-year-old war.

item.title: Uganda confirms new Ebola cases as tracing steps up
item.description: The WHO warns the risk of an epidemic is ‘very high’ in neighbouring Congo, where the outbreak began.

item.title: US President Trump says agreement with Iran has ‘been largely negotiated’ and Strait of Hormuz will be opened
item.description: He said the peace deal with Iran is now ‘subject to finalisation’.

item.title: Family of Kyle Busch reveals two-time NASCAR champion’s cause of death
item.description: The 41-year-old was struck down by a severe condition that quickly progressed into something lethal.

item.title: Ebola clinic tent by Doctors Without Borders set ablaze in Congo with 18 leaving amid virus outbreak
item.description: Angry residents set fire to the tent, causing 18 people suspected of the infection to leave.

item.title: Riley McGree’s World Cup hopes in danger after limping off in Championship playoff final
item.description: One of Australia’s most creative and explosive players is in a race against time.

item.title: Localised Optus outage hits SA town for several hours
item.description: Police say an equipment fault is behind the latest disruption, with Optus technicians fixing it about 12pm.

item.title: Paul Simon bemoans Elvis Presley 'wasting his great talent'
item.description: 'Really, by ‘57, I’d lost interest in Elvis Presley.’

item.title: ‘Unnecessary tragedy’: Bob Katter blasts shark laws after fatal Far North Queensland attack
item.description: Bob Katter says rising numbers are ‘out of control’ following the death of a 39-year-old man.

item.title: 7NEWS Spotlight: Olympian Libby Trickett sounds alarm after near death experience
item.description: ‘The amount of families destroyed because a woman has this catastrophic event is more than I can bear.’

item.title: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack on Ukrainian capital Kyiv
item.description: Vladimir Putin says several such missiles, even with conventional warheads, could be as devastating as a nuclear strike.

item.title: China sending astronaut on year-long space mission
item.description: The race to return a human to the moon is heating up as pressure mounts on China to meet its 2030 deadline.

item.title: Oscar Piastri fumes over team radio after risky strategy backfires as Kimi Antonelli wins Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: ‘Major, major disappointment and there will be a very big debrief at McLaren after this.’

item.title: Dezi Freeman: Coronial inquests into deaths of fugitive and two slain Victorian police officers to begin
item.description: Speculation has been rife over how Freeman eluded capture for seven months.

item.title: Formula One legend Alain Prost becomes victim of violent home attack
item.description: The 71-year-old has suffered a head injury after coming face to face with intruders in his home.

item.title: Peter V’landys becomes interim NRL chief executive after Andrew Abdo quits to join Tennis Australia
item.description: Rugby league’s supremo has made an immediate move amid the ‘devastation’ of his right-hand man’s departure.

item.title: US comedian Laura Clery reveals ‘terrifying’ accident after being pinned under 270kg fridge
item.description: ‘I could feel it getting harder to inhale, like my body was deciding to shut down.’

item.title: Australian hero Neale Daniher dies aged 65 after brave 13-year battle with MND
item.description: The AFL icon’s inspiring life is sadly over, but he never gave up the fight.

item.title: Do It For Dolly Day inches toward $2 million goal as fight continues to end bullying
item.description: ‘The love Australians have shown for Dolly and for our cause never ceases to move us.’

item.title: Gerard Baden-Clay facing another decade in prison for murder of wife Allison under new parole laws
item.description: A landmark change in Queensland could block the infamous murderer from applying for parole next year.

item.title: Rough sleepers, ex‑prisoners living in Adelaide park Edinburgh Reserve ordered to leave
item.description: Council has now issued the group of men living in the Adelaide park an ultimatum.

item.title: AFL bombshell as Collingwood potentially robbed of win over Hawthorn due to interchange blunder
item.description: ‘They should protest, because it’s so obvious. The evidence is there that the result should be their win.’

item.title: Neale Daniher’s closest mates Bill Guest and Chris Fagan share agonising last conversations
item.description: The icon still had his humour but ‘I knew when we left we’d never see Neale again - it was very sad’.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi joins list of injury concerns ahead of kick-off in US, Canada and Mexico
item.description: The tournament begins in just three weeks.

item.title: Russia warns foreigners to evacuate Kyiv as it threatens onslaught on Ukraine’s capital
item.description: Moscow claims the strikes are in response to an attack on a student dorm in Russian-controlled Luhansk.

item.title: Donald Trump hinges Iran peace deal on Arab nations recognising Israel
item.description: The US president has warned of fresh attacks if current peace talks fail.

item.title: Vital Socceroos star Riley McGree ruled out with hamstring injury in major World Cup blow
item.description: Australia will be without one of their most creative and influential players for the tournament.

item.title: Dozens of drones plunge from the sky during Vivid Sydney light show
item.description: Multiple shows have been cancelled following the malfunction.

item.title: Two arrested over murder of suspected Sydney gang kingpin Lorenzo Lamalu in Vietnam
item.description: The public assassination at a busy restaurant was caught on CCTV.

item.title: Rescuers race against time to reach seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
item.description: Seven people who ventured into a cave to look for gold have been trapped for a week after flash flooding blocked their exit.

item.title: US unleashes barrage of new ‘self-defence strikes’ on Iran during tense peace talks
item.description: Tensions are intensifying between the two countries as both sides contest details in proposed peace agreements.

item.title: 2026 American Music Awards: The best looks from the red carpet before BTS opened the 52nd ceremony
item.description: The stars have descended on Las Vegas as the annual ceremony kicks off at the iconic MGM Grand.

item.title: ‘I’m a free agent’: Former prime minister Malcolm Turnbull throws his support behind political comeback
item.description: ‘I support diversity in our politics. I like to see competition.’

item.title: Danish Royal Run: Queen Mary supported by her children for the annual event
item.description: The Australian-born royal announced her father’s sad passing in April.

item.title: Travis Head and wife Jess subjected to social media abuse after Virat Kohli handshake snub
item.description: The Aussie superstar has been bombarded with tens of thousands of abusive comments online.

item.title: Spanish government confirms new ‘close contact’ case of hantavirus linked to cruise ship MV Hondius
item.description: The new case involves a ‘close contact’ of a person connected to the initial outbreak, Spain’s Health Ministry said.

item.title: Brisbane Airport passenger pleads guilty after shoving Virgin Australia staff member
item.description: The staff member was shoved when a man was refused boarding on a connecting flight.

item.title: Cathay Pacific passenger recounts terrifying moment flight from Brisbane to Hong Kong plunged mid-air
item.description: ‘You definitely didn’t think it was going to end well, that’s for sure.’

item.title: Sam Armytage farewells her 100-year-old grandma Dorothy with emotional post
item.description: ‘She was 100 and pure magic.’

item.title: Millions of Australian households to save hundreds on power bills from July
item.description: Some households could save up to $229 a year.

item.title: Calls for early-onset bowel cancer to be considered ‘new disease’ as cases surge among young Aussies
item.description: Doctors are sounding the alarm as the disease is ‘driven by factors that we don’t yet understand.’

item.title: Alleged serial tip jar thief caught on CCTV targeting cafes and charity collections across southeast Queensland
item.description: ‘Five seconds and she’s gone.’

item.title: ‘Dangerous’ baby bottle self-feeding devices permanently banned in Australia
item.description: ‘We urge consumers to stop using these devices immediately.’

item.title: Western Australia spruiks plan for defence manufacturing hub in Collie
item.description: A state government could transform a coal-mining town into a hub for building military equipment.

item.title: Brisbane City Council slugs drivers more than $45 million in parking fines in less than a year
item.description: The numbers reveal which parking offences are costing motorists the most.

item.title: Iran labels new US strikes as ‘gross violation’ of ceasefire
item.description: ‘The clock cannot be turned back, and the nations and lands of the region will no longer be a shield for American bases.’

item.title: Politicians clash as changes to capital gains tax split public opinion
item.description: ‘In politics, you don’t do the popular thing, you do the right thing.’

item.title: Major change coming to JobSeeker after years of ‘inefficiencies’
item.description: The reforms mark the system’s first overhaul in three decades.

item.title: Anne Hathaway reveals secret health battle: 'Half blind'
item.description: ‘I didn’t realise how bad it had gotten.’

item.title: Humble farmer’s shocking response to winning $12 million lottery prize
item.description: ‘Now is not a good time.’

item.title: Renewed call for Indigenous Voice to Parliament during Reconciliation Week
item.description: One thing has become increasingly clear since the referendum in 2023, say Uluru Dialogue co-chairs.

item.title: Westpac ordered to pay $26 million penalty after ‘grossly negligent’ conduct
item.description: ‘Instead of providing a safety net for these customers ... systemic failures let them slip through the cracks.’

item.title: Koala found during controversial clearing of trees at Ormiston College, Queensland
item.description: Protesters oppose the felling of trees to make way for playing fields, a pool and boarding houses at Brisbane’s Ormiston College.

item.title: James Brayshaw blasts hidden ‘toxicity’ at AFL clubs after Brad Scott sacking
item.description: The star Channel 7 commentator is baffled by the situation, and has a stinging message for past players.

item.title: Queensland teenager suffers life-threatening internal injuries in horse accident
item.description: ‘The pain was spreading everywhere. It was like I had been winded but like a hundred times worse.’

item.title: Police called after machete scare at Nando’s Munno Para in Adelaide’s north
item.description: An Adelaide man has been arrested in relation to the incident.

item.title: Customers caught up in ticketing reshuffle as Come Alive! The Greatest Showman Circus Spectacular comes to Australia
item.description: Attendees claim seats to the popular live show were moved back and some families were separated across venues.

item.title: Gus Lamont search: Eight months since four-year-old went missing from South Australian sheep station
item.description: The four-year-old boy was last seen playing outside his family’s homestead before he disappeared, leaving a single footprint in the red dirt.

item.title: Five of seven people trapped in Laos cave found alive, rescuers say
item.description: The lost villagers have been trapped for a week after heavy flooding blocked the exit.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Heartwarming moment rescue team celebrates after survivors discovered in Laos cave
item.description: The five villagers were trapped in a flooded cave for eight days before a Thai rescue crew located them.

item.title: Alex de Minaur’s potential next opponent Jakub Mensik collapses at French Open in ‘insane’ heat
item.description: ‘My body just turned off.’

item.title: Erin Patterson locks in date to appeal convictions for death cap mushroom murders
item.description: The 51-year-old has outlined the grounds of her appeal.

item.title: Luckless Australian tennis star Thanasi Kokkinakis out of French Open with another injury blow
item.description: The future of much-loved star Thanasi Kokkinakis is once again in doubt after another savage injury blow.

item.title: Pat Cummins and Travis Head miss out on IPL final after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powers Rajasthan Royals to victory
item.description: The freakish teenager has once again left the cricket world speechless.

item.title: Novak Djokovic fires up at French Open crowd during hostile clash: ‘No respect’
item.description: The 24-time grand slam champion was booed throughout the marathon encounter.

item.title: Tax changes defended by Labor higher-ups despite criticism from state leaders
item.description: Two state premiers have now broken ranks and urged the government to change course.

item.title: Eleven feared dead in US chemical tank rupture as search moves from rescue to recovery
item.description: ‘We’re bracing ourselves for this being the deadliest industrial tragedy in modern Washington state history.’

item.title: Home and Away: Who will get shot?
item.description: Will one beloved Summer Bay resident take their last breath?

item.title: Essendon facing potential exodus with Darcy Parish, Zach Merrett and Jordan Ridley all considering future
item.description: ‘I’m certain that he’d look at it.’

item.title: Three arrested in Samoa over murder of suspected Sydney gang leader in Vietnam
item.description: The arrests come after two men confessed on TV to carrying out the shooting.

item.title: Lexus explains why it slashed more than $40,000 off the price of its electric SUV
item.description: Lexus Australia says its heavily discounted RZ electric SUV is the result of improved production efficiencies and a more competitive EV market.

item.title: Nathan Cleary sends blunt message to doubters after State of Origin masterclass
item.description: ‘Live by the sword, die by the sword.’

item.title: Interim Essendon coach Dean Solomon not entertaining full-time job but not ruling it out
item.description: ‘My last 48 hours has been chaos.’

item.title: 2026 Volkswagen Tiguan eHybrid review
item.description: Volkswagen has belatedly entered Australia's mainstream PHEV market with the Tiguan eHybrid, boasting over 100km of electric range and solid value for money.

item.title: Broncos prop Corey Jensen shares harrowing details of blood clot diagnosis
item.description: ‘You need to get to emergency. Your lung is full of blood clots.’

item.title: Brisbane Lions veteran Dayne Zorko hit for six, Sydney captain Callum Mills set to miss
item.description: Two premiership hopefuls are counting the cost of a lengthy injury list.

item.title: Ferrari reintroducing manual transmission despite electrification push
item.description: Still mad about the Ferrari Luce EV? You may be pleased to hear the Prancing Horse brand is reportedly reintroducing a manual transmission.

item.title: Rafael Nadal transformation sparks tennis storm: ‘What happened to Rafa?’
item.description: When the legend shared a photo on social media, he could not have imagined the viral reaction.

item.title: Bullsbrook quarantine extended for Australian passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Australia’s Health Minister has revealed why the isolation period will be pushed out by weeks.

item.title: Denza over-the-air updates bring improvements to towing, off-road ability
item.description: Denza is rolling out updates to its SUVs in Australia aimed at improving their towing capability and off-road ability.

item.title: ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo spared from Eid sacrifice after going viral in Bangladesh
item.description: The albino buffalo’s flowing blond hair and fringe drew comparisons to the US president.

item.title: Residents warned of powerful weather event forecast to impact Western Australia’s coast
item.description: It is likely to bring damaging winds, heavy rainfall and possible six-metre waves.

item.title: Neale Daniher state funeral to be held at the MCG on June 10
item.description: The service will take place two days after the iconic Big Freeze match.

item.title: Laurie Daley immediately reveals NSW team change for State of Origin II
item.description: The winning coach has already made two decisions on his next Blues line-up.

item.title: Tesla driver allegedly caught sleeping at the wheel on Sydney’s M2 motorway
item.description: The man can be seen leaning back in his seat with his hands not visible on the steering wheel.

item.title: Lexus to 'double down' on ownership experience in fight against new Chinese rivals
item.description: Lexus is planning to further sharpen its customer perks and aftersales support as competition in Australia’s premium market heats up.

item.title: Woman fronts court after alleged tip jar and charity box theft spree in Queensland
item.description: ‘It’s just so many of them,’ a magistrate said while refusing the woman bail.

item.title: Latest Gus Lamont search in outback South Australia uncovers no new evidence
item.description: Task force officers returned to the remote outback station for an 11th time this week.

item.title: Supercars referee Craig Baird cops whack for publicly shaming ‘grub’ driver Ryan Wood
item.description: The respected official has been forced to issue a public statement after crossing a line.

item.title: Flood warnings across four states as heavy rain lashes parts of Australia
item.description: The intense weather system dumped up to 65mm of rain within 30 minutes in some areas.

item.title: Adam Simpson surprisingly named on Carlton’s panel to find next full-time coach
item.description: One of the men sounded out for the job has been recruited by the Blues after all - but not to lead the team.

item.title: Phoenix Heazlewood fighting for life after being hit by car, having part of skull removed
item.description: Phoenix Heazlewood was placed in a coma to help his survival chances but an MRI revealed there was extensive damage to his brain.

item.title: Former rugby league player Garry Sullivan arrested over 1994 Armaguard alleged shooting
item.description: The 78-year-old was arrested after detectives reopened the case into an armed robbery in which three people were allegedly shot.

item.title: Skoda Octavia to take on Camry with new Toyota-style hybrid system
item.description: The Volkswagen Group's new 'full' hybrid powertrain will appear in the Skoda Octavia, according to the Czech brand's technical boss.

item.title: Pelican Waters man charged after teen cyclist left with ‘life-changing’ injuries in alleged hit-run
item.description: The 13-year-old boy has endured marathon surgeries lasting up to 15 hours.

item.title: Australian Josh Richards flying to Laos to rescue survivors trapped in flooded cave
item.description: The experienced diver concedes he is ‘scared’ as rescue teams battle dangerous conditions.

item.title: Australian ‘looksmaxxer’ influencer Androgenic removed from Jetstar flight after cosmetic surgery in Thailand
item.description: ‘You’re swelling right now, your eyes ... Your face is very ill.’

item.title: ‘Pathetic’ Saints’ record nightmare worsens as star recruit Sam Flanders stopped in his tracks
item.description: The injury flattened St Kilda further with players bracing for a ‘proper cooking’ from Ross Lyon.

item.title: One Powerball player wins $60 million jackpot
item.description: The win also means the game has cracked a major new milestone just days after its 30th anniversary.

item.title: More State of Origin glory for NSW in historic clean sweep over Queensland
item.description: The Blues came close last year and weren’t to be denied at the second time of asking.
